post.description:
Handles inbound interactive payloads from Slack â€” button clicks, menu selections, and modal submissions.

This is the **Request URL** configured under *Interactivity & Shortcuts* in the Slack app settings.

Slack sends `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` with a `payload` field containing a JSON string.

**Supported payload types:**

- `block_actions` â€” Button clicks on Block Kit messages. Routes flow decisions, project/session actions, memory configuration, and next-step feedback.
- `view_submission` â€” Modal submissions (reserved for future use).

**Action IDs:**

| Action ID | Description |
|---|---|
| `refinement_agent` | Choose agent-driven idea refinement |
| `refinement_manual` | Choose manual idea refinement |
| `idea_approve` | Approve the refined idea |
| `idea_cancel` | Cancel after idea refinement |
| `requirements_approve` | Approve requirements breakdown |
| `requirements_cancel` | Cancel after requirements breakdown |
| `flow_cancel` | Cancel the flow at any point |
| `project_create` | Start new project creation |
| `project_continue` | Continue with selected project |
| `project_switch` | Switch the active project |
| `session_end` | End the active session |
| `project_select_<project_id>` | Select a project by id |
| `memory_configure` | Open memory configuration menu |
| `memory_idea` | Add idea & iteration guardrails |
| `memory_knowledge` | Add knowledge entries |
| `memory_tools` | Add implementation tools/tech |
| `memory_view` | View current memory entries |
| `memory_done` | Finish memory configuration |
| `next_step_accept` | Accept proactive next-step suggestion |
| `next_step_dismiss` | Dismiss proactive next-step suggestion |

All payloads are verified using `verify_slack_request` (HMAC-SHA256 or deprecated verification token).
